TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-pear-dakis 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mhm eniqan kingan ah rudan ha.
S.PHON: mħm eniqan kiŋan aħ ɾudan ħa.
S.FORM: mhm eniqan kingan ah rudan ha.
S.PHON: mħm eniqan kiŋan aħ ɾudan ħa.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人,
there is an old man.

S.FORM: maanu di mhada ciida hei na qhuni.
S.PHON: maanu di mħada ʦiida ħei na qħuni.
S.FORM: maanu di mhada ciida hei na qhuni.
S.PHON: maanu di mħada ʦiida ħei na qħuni.
S.TRANSL: 水果成熟的時候.
when the fruit ripe

S.FORM: yaani kelaanna qutirodux uri ah so hari so hari qutirodux qitaan te kelaan so mhm nasi uri ini kelai.
S.PHON: jaani kelaanna qutiɾodux uɾi aħ so ħaɾi so ħaɾi qutiɾodux qitaan te kelaan so mħm nasi uɾi ini kelai.
S.FORM: yaani kelaanna qutirodux uri ah so hari so hari qutirodux qitaan te kelaan so mhm nasi uri ini kelai.
S.PHON: jaani kelaanna qutiɾodux uɾi aħ so ħaɾi so ħaɾi qutiɾodux qitaan te kelaan so mħm nasi uɾi ini kelai.
S.TRANSL: 可能是芭樂或是梨子.
probably it is guava or pear.

S.FORM: ma qhunina paru ha.
S.PHON: ma qħunina paɾu ħa.
S.FORM: ma qhunina paru ha.
S.PHON: ma qħunina paɾu ħa.
S.TRANSL: 水果很大.
the fruits are big.

S.FORM: tkhako musa lmamu ka rudan nii.
S.PHON: tkħako musa lmamu ka ɾudan nii.
S.FORM: tkhako musa lmamu ka rudan nii.
S.PHON: tkħako musa lmamu ka ɾudan nii.
S.TRANSL: 老人走上梯子去採收.
the old man goes up ladder and he picks fruits.

S.FORM: eh rudan ni we madis a rawa posaanna hei qhuni.
S.PHON: eħ ɾudan ni we madis a ɾawa posaanna ħei qħuni.
S.FORM: eh rudan ni we madis a rawa posaanna hei qhuni.
S.PHON: eħ ɾudan ni we madis a ɾawa posaanna ħei qħuni.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人帶藍子放水果.
That old man carries baskets to put fruits.

S.FORM: ma madis hako.
S.PHON: ma madis ħako.
S.FORM: ma madis hako.
S.PHON: ma madis ħako.
S.TRANSL: 還帶梯子.
And also carries a ladder.

S.FORM: ma paru ka paru ka ah qhuni kii bubuna qhuni ha.
S.PHON: ma paɾu ka paɾu ka aħ qħuni kii bubuna qħuni ħa.
S.FORM: ma paru ka paru ka ah qhuni kii bubuna qhuni ha.
S.PHON: ma paɾu ka paɾu ka aħ qħuni kii bubuna qħuni ħa.
S.TRANSL: 那棵樹很大,
the mother tree is big

S.FORM: ini dehe eh heina we mhei de ini dehaki mangan baga asi ka tkhako.
S.PHON: ini deħe eħ ħeina we mħei de ini deħaki maŋan baga asi ka tkħako.
S.FORM: ini dehe eh heina we mhei de ini dehaki mangan baga asi ka tkhako.
S.PHON: ini deħe eħ ħeina we mħei de ini deħaki maŋan baga asi ka tkħako.
S.TRANSL: 水果結果實的時候,伸手也拿不到,必須爬梯子上去採收.

TRANSL.notes: When the tree bears fruits, you cannot reach hand to pick up. One has to climb ladder up to pick (them) up.

S.TRANSL: When the tree bears fruits, you cannot reach hand to pick up. One has to climb ladder up to pick up.

S.FORM: ma lmamu lmamu ka ima di rudan nii.
S.PHON: ma lmamu lmamu ka ima di ɾudan nii.
S.FORM: ma lmamu lmamu ka ima di rudan nii.
S.PHON: ma lmamu lmamu ka ima di ɾudan nii.
S.TRANSL: 這老人在摘水果.
the old man is picking fruits.

S.FORM: ma i uxe beyo daha daha rawa ka lnmwan na hei qhuni ciida.
S.PHON: ma i uxe bejo daħa daħa ɾawa ka lnmwan na ħei qħuni ʦiida.
S.FORM: ma i uxe beyo daha daha rawa ka lnmwan na hei qhuni ciida.
S.PHON: ma i uxe bejo daħa daħa ɾawa ka lnmwan na ħei qħuni ʦiida.
S.TRANSL: 然後他採兩籃水果的時候,
then when he picks two baskets of fruits,

S.FORM: ma moda hii ka kinganna riso rudan hari.
S.PHON: ma moda ħii ka kiŋanna ɾiso ɾudan ħaɾi.
S.FORM: ma moda hii ka kinganna riso rudan hari.
S.PHON: ma moda ħii ka kiŋanna ɾiso ɾudan ħaɾi.
S.TRANSL: 一個青年經過那裡.
an elder boy passes there.

S.FORM: ma tmulus ah miric ha.
S.PHON: ma tmulus aħ miɾiʦ ħa.
S.FORM: ma tmulus ah miric ha.
S.PHON: ma tmulus aħ miɾiʦ ħa.
S.TRANSL: 他牽著羊,
he carries a sheep.

S.FORM: ye maha tmabu miric na.
S.PHON: je maħa tmabu miɾiʦ na.
S.FORM: ye maha tmabu miric na.
S.PHON: je maħa tmabu miɾiʦ na.
S.TRANSL: 可能他去餵羊.
maybe he is going to feed the sheep.

S.FORM: ma wada tmulus tmulus ma moda s moda toma mhm baki ga lmamu hei qhuni nii.
S.PHON: ma wada tmulus tmulus ma moda s moda toma mħm baki ga lmamu ħei qħuni nii.
S.FORM: ma wada tmulus tmulus ma moda s moda toma mhm baki ga lmamu hei qhuni nii.
S.PHON: ma wada tmulus tmulus ma moda s moda toma mħm baki ga lmamu ħei qħuni nii.
S.TRANSL: 牽著羊,他經過老人正在採水果的果樹下面.
then carrying the sheep, he passed under the tree that the old man is picking fruits.

S.FORM: kika wada moda elu wa wada hmrinas ma wada moda eluna kika REDosaunna ma qmlahang miric ah REDosaunna qmlahang miric osaunna tmabu miric peni.
S.PHON: kika wada moda elu wa wada ħmɾinas ma wada moda eluna kika ɾedosaunna ma qmlaħaŋ miɾiʦ aħ ɾedosaunna qmlaħaŋ miɾiʦ osaunna tmabu miɾiʦ peni.
S.FORM: kika wada moda elu wa wada hmrinas ma wada moda eluna kika REDosaunna ma qmlahang miric ah REDosaunna qmlahang miric osaunna tmabu miric peni.
S.PHON: kika wada moda elu wa wada ħmɾinas ma wada moda eluna kika ɾedosaunna ma qmlaħaŋ miɾiʦ aħ ɾedosaunna qmlaħaŋ miɾiʦ osaunna tmabu miɾiʦ peni.
S.TRANSL: 他經過,然後往他養羊的地方走去.
he passes, go toward the place where he raises sheep.

S.FORM: ma ini qbsiyaq eniqan kingan laqi.
S.PHON: ma ini qbsijaq eniqan kiŋan laqi.
S.FORM: ma ini qbsiyaq eniqan kingan laqi.
S.PHON: ma ini qbsijaq eniqan kiŋan laqi.
S.TRANSL: 不久有一個小孩,
in a short while, there is a child.

S.FORM: eh s taapa rulu ha rulu ge jidensha ha.
S.PHON: eħ s taapa ɾulu ħa ɾulu ge jidensħa ħa.
S.FORM: eh s taapa rulu ha rulu ge jidensha ha.
S.PHON: eħ s taapa ɾulu ħa ɾulu ge jidensħa ħa.
S.TRANSL: 他在騎rulu.Rulu是腳踏車的意思.
he is riding a rulu. Rulu is a bike.

S.FORM: jidensha mesa kari tahtunux ma.
S.PHON: jidensħa mesa kaɾi taħtunux ma.
S.FORM: jidensha mesa kari tahtunux ma.
S.PHON: jidensħa mesa kaɾi taħtunux ma.
S.TRANSL: jidensha是日語.
jidensha is the Japanese word,

S.FORM: taapa jidensha laqi q laqi nii ma wisu uN moda toma inu di.
S.PHON: taapa jidensħa laqi q laqi nii ma wisu un moda toma inu di.
S.FORM: taapa jidensha laqi q laqi nii ma wisu uN moda toma inu di.
S.PHON: taapa jidensħa laqi q laqi nii ma wisu un moda toma inu di.
S.TRANSL: 然後這小孩騎腳踏車來下面...
the child is riding bike and he comes under...

S.FORM: eh moda mi mu musa qitaanna ga lmamu hei qhuni ka ba kingan rudan kiya ma mu musa ah qitaanna ye mesa lmamu hei qhuni ma ga waga baro ka rudan kii.
S.PHON: eħ moda mi mu musa qitaanna ga lmamu ħei qħuni ka ba kiŋan ɾudan kija ma mu musa aħ qitaanna je mesa lmamu ħei qħuni ma ga waga baɾo ka ɾudan kii.
S.FORM: eh moda mi mu musa qitaanna ga lmamu hei qhuni ka ba kingan rudan kiya ma mu musa ah qitaanna ye mesa lmamu hei qhuni ma ga waga baro ka rudan kii.
S.PHON: eħ moda mi mu musa qitaanna ga lmamu ħei qħuni ka ba kiŋan ɾudan kija ma mu musa aħ qitaanna je mesa lmamu ħei qħuni ma ga waga baɾo ka ɾudan kii.
S.TRANSL: 他看到老人在上面採水果.
he saw the old man is picking fruits above.

S.FORM: ma lnamuna ye gana posaun dheran di.
S.PHON: ma lnamuna je gana posaun dħeɾan di.
S.FORM: ma lnamuna ye gana posaun dheran di.
S.PHON: ma lnamuna je gana posaun dħeɾan di.
S.TRANSL: 然後他把採過的水果放在地上,
then he put picked fruits on the ground.

S.FORM: ma dheran ah gana posaan rawa truma ha meniq dheran bo dheran peni.
S.PHON: ma dħeɾan aħ gana posaan ɾawa tɾuma ħa meniq dħeɾan bo dħeɾan peni.
S.FORM: ma dheran ah gana posaan rawa truma ha meniq dheran bo dheran peni.
S.PHON: ma dħeɾan aħ gana posaan ɾawa tɾuma ħa meniq dħeɾan bo dħeɾan peni.
S.TRANSL: 然後在地上放著籃子.
basket is put on the ground.

S.FORM: kiya ka ciida de wada laqi nii.
S.PHON: kija ka ʦiida de wada laqi nii.
S.FORM: kiya ka ciida de wada laqi nii.
S.PHON: kija ka ʦiida de wada laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 接著那時候這小孩離開了.
thus at that time, the child left.

S.FORM: qitaanna ka rudan kiya lmamu baro hii ma.
S.PHON: qitaanna ka ɾudan kija lmamu baɾo ħii ma.
S.FORM: qitaanna ka rudan kiya lmamu baro hii ma.
S.PHON: qitaanna ka ɾudan kija lmamu baɾo ħii ma.
S.TRANSL: 他看老人在上面那裡採收,
he saw the old man, picking fruits up there.

S.FORM: ma kika i mesa ka ini ado ga maanu di ini kela ali lmamu ciida ka rudan nii ha ma im.
S.PHON: ma kika i mesa ka ini ado ga maanu di ini kela ali lmamu ʦiida ka ɾudan nii ħa ma im.
S.FORM: ma kika i mesa ka ini ado ga maanu di ini kela ali lmamu ciida ka rudan nii ha ma im.
S.PHON: ma kika i mesa ka ini ado ga maanu di ini kela ali lmamu ʦiida ka ɾudan nii ħa ma im.
S.TRANSL: 然後那時候,老人專心地採收,
at that time, the old man is picking fruits very hard,

S.FORM: ye mesa iniku naq inina qitai ka laqi nii ciida we.
S.PHON: je mesa iniku naq inina qitai ka laqi nii ʦiida we.
S.FORM: ye mesa iniku naq inina qitai ka laqi nii ciida we.
S.PHON: je mesa iniku naq inina qitai ka laqi nii ʦiida we.
S.TRANSL: 他並不知道小孩在看.
he did not even know the child was looking.

S.FORM: wada gmulus mangan kingan maanu di kingan rawana hei qhuni kii.
S.PHON: wada gmulus maŋan kiŋan maanu di kiŋan ɾawana ħei qħuni kii.
S.FORM: wada gmulus mangan kingan maanu di kingan rawana hei qhuni kii.
S.PHON: wada gmulus maŋan kiŋan maanu di kiŋan ɾawana ħei qħuni kii.
S.TRANSL: 他偷一籃水果.
he stole one basket of fruits.

S.FORM: so hari ah qutirodux qitaan ha.
S.PHON: so ħaɾi aħ qutiɾodux qitaan ħa.
S.FORM: so hari ah qutirodux qitaan ha.
S.PHON: so ħaɾi aħ qutiɾodux qitaan ħa.
S.TRANSL: 水果看起來是芭樂.
the fruit looks like guava.

S.FORM: ma kika posaanna berahna maanu di jidenshana ma.
S.PHON: ma kika posaanna beɾaħna maanu di jidensħana ma.
S.FORM: ma kika posaanna berahna maanu di jidenshana ma.
S.PHON: ma kika posaanna beɾaħna maanu di jidensħana ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後他把籃子放在他腳踏車前面,
then he put basket in front of his bike,

S.FORM: ma qmita seediq kii qmit qmita qmita rudan di ma.
S.PHON: ma qmita seediq kii qmit qmita qmita ɾudan di ma.
S.FORM: ma qmita seediq kii qmit qmita qmita rudan di ma.
S.PHON: ma qmita seediq kii qmit qmita qmita ɾudan di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後他看這個老人,
then he sees the old man,

S.FORM: ye mesa ka t ini ini huwa ini qita ma.
S.PHON: je mesa ka t ini ini ħuwa ini qita ma.
S.FORM: ye mesa ka t ini ini huwa ini qita ma.
S.PHON: je mesa ka t ini ini ħuwa ini qita ma.
S.TRANSL: 可能在說:「沒有關係,他沒在看.」
probably he is saying that 'it is okay, he is not seeing'.

S.FORM: wadana gruus madis gruusunna madis ciida ma.
S.PHON: wadana gɾuus madis gɾuusunna madis ʦiida ma.
S.FORM: wadana gruus madis gruusunna madis ciida ma.
S.PHON: wadana gɾuus madis gɾuusunna madis ʦiida ma.
S.TRANSL: 那時候他偷偷地帶走籃子,
at that time he stole and carried the basket.

S.FORM: wada muka mu wad wada wada maanu di maha kelaan maha sapah nii peni laqi.
S.PHON: wada muka mu wad wada wada maanu di maħa kelaan maħa sapaħ nii peni laqi.
S.FORM: wada muka mu wad wada wada maanu di maha kelaan maha sapah nii peni laqi.
S.PHON: wada muka mu wad wada wada maanu di maħa kelaan maħa sapaħ nii peni laqi.
S.TRANSL: 小孩回家,
the child is going house.

S.FORM: ni gruusanna madis yena eh yena adisun inu ini kelai yena baruyun yena ini kelai.
S.PHON: ni gɾuusanna madis jena eħ jena adisun inu ini kelai jena baɾujun jena ini kelai.
S.FORM: ni gruusanna madis yena eh yena adisun inu ini kelai yena baruyun yena ini kelai.
S.PHON: ni gɾuusanna madis jena eħ jena adisun inu ini kelai jena baɾujun jena ini kelai.
S.TRANSL: 他偷偷帶走的果實,不曉得要帶到那裏或要賣.
the fruit he stealthily took away, I wonder where he brings or whether he sells.

S.FORM: wada moda elu ciida k moda elu ciida ini dehuk sapah dung we sterung kingan laqi mqedin.
S.PHON: wada moda elu ʦiida k moda elu ʦiida ini deħuk sapaħ duŋ we steɾuŋ kiŋan laqi mqedin.
S.FORM: wada moda elu ciida k moda elu ciida ini dehuk sapah dung we sterung kingan laqi mqedin.
S.PHON: wada moda elu ʦiida k moda elu ʦiida ini deħuk sapaħ duŋ we steɾuŋ kiŋan laqi mqedin.
S.TRANSL: 在路上,還沒到家的時候,他遇見一個女孩.
when he is on the way, before arriving at his house, he met a girl.

S.FORM: laqi mqedin uri gnduanr taapa densha uri.
S.PHON: laqi mqedin uɾi gnduanɾ taapa densħa uɾi.
S.FORM: laqi mqedin uri gnduanr taapa densha uri.
S.PHON: laqi mqedin uɾi gnduanɾ taapa densħa uɾi.
S.TRANSL: 女孩也騎腳踏車來.
the girl also is riding a bike.

S.FORM: taapa densha ciida laqi nii laqi mqedin nii we.
S.PHON: taapa densħa ʦiida laqi nii laqi mqedin nii we.
S.FORM: taapa densha ciida laqi nii laqi mqedin nii we.
S.PHON: taapa densħa ʦiida laqi nii laqi mqedin nii we.
S.TRANSL: 那時候女孩騎腳踏車,
at that time the girl was riding bike.

S.FORM: ah eh ado ka rseno heya na ye mesa qitaan do laqi mqedin nii ye mbtunux qitaan huwa mesa huwa mesa ka hnyeganna mqedin nii ma.
S.PHON: aħ eħ ado ka ɾseno ħeja na je mesa qitaan do laqi mqedin nii je mbtunux qitaan ħuwa mesa ħuwa mesa ka ħnjeganna mqedin nii ma.
S.FORM: ah eh ado ka rseno heya na ye mesa qitaan do laqi mqedin nii ye mbtunux qitaan huwa mesa huwa mesa ka hnyeganna mqedin nii ma.
S.PHON: aħ eħ ado ka ɾseno ħeja na je mesa qitaan do laqi mqedin nii je mbtunux qitaan ħuwa mesa ħuwa mesa ka ħnjeganna mqedin nii ma.
S.TRANSL: 因為他是男生,可能看女孩子長得可愛,
because he is a boy, probably he thinks the girl is cute.

S.FORM: a ani qmita mu laqi mqedin nii ka ka laqi ah laqi rseno nii ma.
S.PHON: a ani qmita mu laqi mqedin nii ka ka laqi aħ laqi ɾseno nii ma.
S.FORM: a ani qmita mu laqi mqedin nii ka ka laqi ah laqi rseno nii ma.
S.PHON: a ani qmita mu laqi mqedin nii ka ka laqi aħ laqi ɾseno nii ma.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩看女孩,然後,
the boy sees the girl and then,

S.FORM: kika inina kelai eniqan btunux ka elu ma ptebuk btunux ka maanu di jidenshana di ma takun ka laqi nii.
S.PHON: kika inina kelai eniqan btunux ka elu ma ptebuk btunux ka maanu di jidensħana di ma takun ka laqi nii.
S.FORM: kika inina kelai eniqan btunux ka elu ma ptebuk btunux ka maanu di jidenshana di ma takun ka laqi nii.
S.PHON: kika inina kelai eniqan btunux ka elu ma ptebuk btunux ka maanu di jidensħana di ma takun ka laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 所以他不知道路上有石頭,然後腳踏車撞到石頭,然後小孩跌倒.
So, he did not know that there was a stone in the road, the bike bumped into the stone, then the child fell.

S.FORM: takun ciida de cuwaq ka maanu di den ah hei qhuni lnuwanna.
S.PHON: takun ʦiida de ʦuwaq ka maanu di den aħ ħei qħuni lnuwanna.
S.FORM: takun ciida de cuwaq ka maanu di den ah hei qhuni lnuwanna.
S.PHON: takun ʦiida de ʦuwaq ka maanu di den aħ ħei qħuni lnuwanna.
S.TRANSL: 他跌倒,然後水果傾倒,
he fell down and then the fruit spilled.

S.FORM: ma bunuhna uri we wada wada odaan tmaus na laqi mqedin ma tqada so theya hari.
S.PHON: ma bunuħna uɾi we wada wada odaan tmaus na laqi mqedin ma tqada so tħeja ħaɾi.
S.FORM: ma bunuhna uri we wada wada odaan tmaus na laqi mqedin ma tqada so theya hari.
S.PHON: ma bunuħna uɾi we wada wada odaan tmaus na laqi mqedin ma tqada so tħeja ħaɾi.
S.TRANSL: 帽子也飛走了,女孩碰落帽子,然後帽子摔出遠方.
the hat also went away. The girl touched it and it leaped far away.

S.FORM: wada thrinas ah wada mtheya ah bunuhna dahaka maanu di bunuh knbunuhanna we theya hari q tngodaanna na kiya ma kika.
S.PHON: wada tħɾinas aħ wada mtħeja aħ bunuħna daħaka maanu di bunuħ knbunuħanna we tħeja ħaɾi q tŋodaanna na kija ma kika.
S.FORM: wada thrinas ah wada mtheya ah bunuhna dahaka maanu di bunuh knbunuhanna we theya hari q tngodaanna na kiya ma kika.
S.PHON: wada tħɾinas aħ wada mtħeja aħ bunuħna daħaka maanu di bunuħ knbunuħanna we tħeja ħaɾi q tŋodaanna na kija ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 他戴的帽子飛遠方了,
the hat he was wearing went far away.

S.FORM: lu hei qhuni lunam eh gnruusanna madis kingan rawa ge tqada theya quri icin ka kiya.
S.PHON: lu ħei qħuni lunam eħ gnɾuusanna madis kiŋan ɾawa ge tqada tħeja quɾi iʦin ka kija.
S.FORM: lu hei qhuni lunam eh gnruusanna madis kingan rawa ge tqada theya quri icin ka kiya.
S.PHON: lu ħei qħuni lunam eħ gnɾuusanna madis kiŋan ɾawa ge tqada tħeja quɾi iʦin ka kija.
S.TRANSL: 所以,他偷偷帶來的一籃水果摔出去另一邊.
so the basket of fruits he stole spilled away to the other side.

S.FORM: ma kika takun laqi nii ma mangan tikuh luqah.
S.PHON: ma kika takun laqi nii ma maŋan tikuħ luqaħ.
S.FORM: ma kika takun laqi nii ma mangan tikuh luqah.
S.PHON: ma kika takun laqi nii ma maŋan tikuħ luqaħ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩因為跌倒他受一點傷,
because the child fell, he got a little hurt.

S.FORM: ma kika qmita luqahna ye ga sdara peni.
S.PHON: ma kika qmita luqaħna je ga sdaɾa peni.
S.FORM: ma kika qmita luqahna ye ga sdara peni.
S.PHON: ma kika qmita luqaħna je ga sdaɾa peni.
S.TRANSL: 所以他看傷口有沒有流血.
So, he is looking at the scar to see if it is bleeding.

S.FORM: ma wisu ka teru lx teru laqi dung.
S.PHON: ma wisu ka teɾu lx teɾu laqi duŋ.
S.FORM: ma wisu ka teru lx teru laqi dung.
S.PHON: ma wisu ka teɾu lx teɾu laqi duŋ.
S.TRANSL: 然後三個小孩來,
then three children come.

S.FORM: ye naq maha mngexan hari ye maha theyaq inu peni ini kelai.
S.PHON: je naq maħa mŋexan ħaɾi je maħa tħejaq inu peni ini kelai.
S.FORM: ye naq maha mngexan hari ye maha theyaq inu peni ini kelai.
S.PHON: je naq maħa mŋexan ħaɾi je maħa tħejaq inu peni ini kelai.
S.TRANSL: 他們跟他差不多的年齡,他們可能去玩.
they are almost the same age as him. Maybe they are on their way to play.

S.FORM: kika teru ris teru laqi laq ah teru laqi ah.
S.PHON: kika teɾu ɾis teɾu laqi laq aħ teɾu laqi aħ.
S.FORM: kika teru ris teru laqi laq ah teru laqi ah.
S.PHON: kika teɾu ɾis teɾu laqi laq aħ teɾu laqi aħ.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩來,
Three children came.

S.FORM: laqi r ah rseno nii ah qmita wa takun ka ima di ah gunu gnurus mangan ah hei qhuni laqi mhm mhm laqi mnangan hei qhuni nii ciida ma.
S.PHON: laqi ɾ aħ ɾseno nii aħ qmita wa takun ka ima di aħ gunu gnuɾus maŋan aħ ħei qħuni laqi mħm mħm laqi mnaŋan ħei qħuni nii ʦiida ma.
S.FORM: laqi r ah rseno nii ah qmita wa takun ka ima di ah gunu gnurus mangan ah hei qhuni laqi mhm mhm laqi mnangan hei qhuni nii ciida ma.
S.PHON: laqi ɾ aħ ɾseno nii aħ qmita wa takun ka ima di aħ gunu gnuɾus maŋan aħ ħei qħuni laqi mħm mħm laqi mnaŋan ħei qħuni nii ʦiida ma.

TRANSL.notes: (三個小孩)看到那個偷拿水果的小孩跌倒了,

S.TRANSL: 看到那個偷拿水果的小孩跌倒了,
they saw the child who stealthily took fruits fell down.

S.FORM: ma mesa pluwe na ye mesa pluwe naq ma kika dayounna maanu di lmamu ka hei qhuni ma posaanna k posaanna rawa ma kika tutuyunna laqi nii ma.
S.PHON: ma mesa pluwe na je mesa pluwe naq ma kika dajounna maanu di lmamu ka ħei qħuni ma posaanna k posaanna ɾawa ma kika tutujunna laqi nii ma.
S.FORM: ma mesa pluwe na ye mesa pluwe naq ma kika dayounna maanu di lmamu ka hei qhuni ma posaanna k posaanna rawa ma kika tutuyunna laqi nii ma.
S.PHON: ma mesa pluwe na je mesa pluwe naq ma kika dajounna maanu di lmamu ka ħei qħuni ma posaanna k posaanna ɾawa ma kika tutujunna laqi nii ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們可能覺得他可憐,所以幫他撿水果放在籃子裡.
then they maybe felt pitiful, so help him picking the fruits and to put in the basket,

S.FORM: posaanna toma jidenshana ka rawana dung ma.
S.PHON: posaanna toma jidensħana ka ɾawana duŋ ma.
S.FORM: posaanna toma jidenshana ka rawana dung ma.
S.PHON: posaanna toma jidensħana ka ɾawana duŋ ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們扶小孩起來,然後把籃子再放到腳踏車下,
then they raise the child, and put the basket back to under the bike.

S.FORM: ma rireh so dmayo mesa eh mhm.
S.PHON: ma ɾiɾeħ so dmajo mesa eħ mħm.
S.FORM: ma rireh so dmayo mesa eh mhm.
S.PHON: ma ɾiɾeħ so dmajo mesa eħ mħm.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫助他.
they are helping him.

S.FORM: maanu di pluwe naq ah mhm laqi yena nkmekulun maanu hmuwa de luqah han mangan luqah paru de uxe uxe maha sapah.
S.PHON: maanu di pluwe naq aħ mħm laqi jena nkmekulun maanu ħmuwa de luqaħ ħan maŋan luqaħ paɾu de uxe uxe maħa sapaħ.
S.FORM: maanu di pluwe naq ah mhm laqi yena nkmekulun maanu hmuwa de luqah han mangan luqah paru de uxe uxe maha sapah.
S.PHON: maanu di pluwe naq aħ mħm laqi jena nkmekulun maanu ħmuwa de luqaħ ħan maŋan luqaħ paɾu de uxe uxe maħa sapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 他們可憐他,可能他受大傷不能回家.
they felt pitiful. he got big hurt, maybe he cannot to go home.

S.FORM: ma kika mhedu dmayo ciida de ma adisunna di.
S.PHON: ma kika mħedu dmajo ʦiida de ma adisunna di.
S.FORM: ma kika mhedu dmayo ciida de ma adisunna di.
S.PHON: ma kika mħedu dmajo ʦiida de ma adisunna di.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們幫忙完了後,他帶籃子.
then after they finished, he carried the basket.

S.FORM: ma kika wada lqlaqi wada naq teru nii maha theyaq laqi teru nii ini p.
S.PHON: ma kika wada lqlaqi wada naq teɾu nii maħa tħejaq laqi teɾu nii ini p.
S.FORM: ma kika wada lqlaqi wada naq teru nii maha theyaq laqi teru nii ini p.
S.PHON: ma kika wada lqlaqi wada naq teɾu nii maħa tħejaq laqi teɾu nii ini p.
S.TRANSL: 然後小孩們離開,三個小孩去玩.
then children left, the three children left to go to play.

S.FORM: ini pntena osaundaha wada maha sapah ka laqi biciq nii ah laqi gnurus mangan nii.
S.PHON: ini pntena osaundaħa wada maħa sapaħ ka laqi biʦiq nii aħ laqi gnuɾus maŋan nii.
S.FORM: ini pntena osaundaha wada maha sapah ka laqi biciq nii ah laqi gnurus mangan nii.
S.PHON: ini pntena osaundaħa wada maħa sapaħ ka laqi biʦiq nii aħ laqi gnuɾus maŋan nii.
S.TRANSL: 他們的方向不同,比較小的偷東西的孩子要回家.
their destination was not the same. The small child who stole was going home.

S.FORM: ma ini t ini taapa.
S.PHON: ma ini t ini taapa.
S.FORM: ma ini t ini taapa.
S.PHON: ma ini t ini taapa.
S.TRANSL: 但是他沒有騎腳踏車,
but he does not ride bike.

S.FORM: i ma ye ado munang luqah laqi nii ma ini ye ani ini kbeyax maanu di yena ini kmekuli qnleqah denshana di ma.
S.PHON: i ma je ado munaŋ luqaħ laqi nii ma ini je ani ini kbejax maanu di jena ini kmekuli qnleqaħ densħana di ma.
S.FORM: i ma ye ado munang luqah laqi nii ma ini ye ani ini kbeyax maanu di yena ini kmekuli qnleqah denshana di ma.
S.PHON: i ma je ado munaŋ luqaħ laqi nii ma ini je ani ini kbejax maanu di jena ini kmekuli qnleqaħ densħana di ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後可能這小孩受傷,他可能沒力氣踩腳踏車,
then maybe the child got hurt, he probably has no power to do to pedal the bike,

S.FORM: mkkesa ma tulusunna ka zidensyana nii ma kana gunu gnurusna madis kingan rawa maanu di hei qhuni nii wa ma kika.
S.PHON: mkkesa ma tulusunna ka *idensjana nii ma kana gunu gnuɾusna madis kiŋan ɾawa maanu di ħei qħuni nii wa ma kika.
S.FORM: mkkesa ma tulusunna ka zidensyana nii ma kana gunu gnurusna madis kingan rawa maanu di hei qhuni nii wa ma kika.
S.PHON: mkkesa ma tulusunna ka *idensjana nii ma kana gunu gnuɾusna madis kiŋan ɾawa maanu di ħei qħuni nii wa ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 他牽著腳踏車走路,偷偷帶著一籃水果.
he is pulling the bike while waking, stealthily bringing the basket of fruits.

S.FORM: wo mkkesa tikuh ma qmita bukuy.
S.PHON: wo mkkesa tikuħ ma qmita bukuj.
S.FORM: wo mkkesa tikuh ma qmita bukuy.
S.PHON: wo mkkesa tikuħ ma qmita bukuj.
S.TRANSL: 他走了一下之後回頭看,
he walked a little and looked back.

S.FORM: ma qm qm mhm ah qmita teru laqi laqi wada dnayo heya di.
S.PHON: ma qm qm mħm aħ qmita teɾu laqi laqi wada dnajo ħeja di.
S.FORM: ma qm qm mhm ah qmita teru laqi laqi wada dnayo heya di.
S.PHON: ma qm qm mħm aħ qmita teɾu laqi laqi wada dnajo ħeja di.
S.TRANSL: 他看了幫忙過他的那三個小孩.
he sees the three children who helped him.

S.FORM: ma teru na laqi deheya heya nii we eniqan kiya kingan.
S.PHON: ma teɾu na laqi deħeja ħeja nii we eniqan kija kiŋan.
S.FORM: ma teru na laqi deheya heya nii we eniqan kiya kingan.
S.PHON: ma teɾu na laqi deħeja ħeja nii we eniqan kija kiŋan.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩,他們有一個...
the three children, they have one...

S.FORM: mkkesa ma qitaanna ma nii ka k nima ka bunuh nii dungun mesa angalunna bunuh kii ma ye nang ye mkela mesa na laqi waga qmita ka laqi ka mntakun kii uri ma.
S.PHON: mkkesa ma qitaanna ma nii ka k nima ka bunuħ nii duŋun mesa aŋalunna bunuħ kii ma je naŋ je mkela mesa na laqi waga qmita ka laqi ka mntakun kii uɾi ma.
S.FORM: mkkesa ma qitaanna ma nii ka k nima ka bunuh nii dungun mesa angalunna bunuh kii ma ye nang ye mkela mesa na laqi waga qmita ka laqi ka mntakun kii uri ma.
S.PHON: mkkesa ma qitaanna ma nii ka k nima ka bunuħ nii duŋun mesa aŋalunna bunuħ kii ma je naŋ je mkela mesa na laqi waga qmita ka laqi ka mntakun kii uɾi ma.
S.TRANSL: 他們走路看到這個帽子,把帽子撿起來,可能知道那是跌倒的小孩的.
while walking they saw a hat. they took the hat and they probably knew it belongs to the child who fell down,

S.FORM: kiya m maanu di ah mqqita ma ciida ma kika ini ma mesa o ye mesa na heya ka bunuh nii ma kika haducunna.
S.PHON: kija m maanu di aħ mqqita ma ʦiida ma kika ini ma mesa o je mesa na ħeja ka bunuħ nii ma kika ħaduʦunna.
S.FORM: kiya m maanu di ah mqqita ma ciida ma kika ini ma mesa o ye mesa na heya ka bunuh nii ma kika haducunna.
S.PHON: kija m maanu di aħ mqqita ma ʦiida ma kika ini ma mesa o je mesa na ħeja ka bunuħ nii ma kika ħaduʦunna.
S.TRANSL: 他們互相看,他們說帽子是他的,所以由其中一個送回來.
they looked at each other, and they said this is his hat, so one of them sent it back.

S.FORM: haducunna haducunna laqi nii ka bunuh nii ciida de kika laqi mntakun gnruus mangan hei qhuni ge angalunna ka teru hei qhuni di ma begeunna riso dnayona deheya.
S.PHON: ħaduʦunna ħaduʦunna laqi nii ka bunuħ nii ʦiida de kika laqi mntakun gnɾuus maŋan ħei qħuni ge aŋalunna ka teɾu ħei qħuni di ma begeunna ɾiso dnajona deħeja.
S.FORM: haducunna haducunna laqi nii ka bunuh nii ciida de kika laqi mntakun gnruus mangan hei qhuni ge angalunna ka teru hei qhuni di ma begeunna riso dnayona deheya.
S.PHON: ħaduʦunna ħaduʦunna laqi nii ka bunuħ nii ʦiida de kika laqi mntakun gnɾuus maŋan ħei qħuni ge aŋalunna ka teɾu ħei qħuni di ma begeunna ɾiso dnajona deħeja.
S.TRANSL: 他還帽子的時候,跌倒又偷水果的那孩子拿了三個水果,送給幫忙他的男孩們.
when he gave the hat back, the child who fell and stole fruits took three fruits and gave them, to the boy who helped him.

S.FORM: kika wada di.
S.PHON: kika wada di.
S.FORM: kika wada di.
S.PHON: kika wada di.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們離開.
then they left.

S.FORM: dn ma kika riso teru nii ka pnkingan teru bnegena teru bnegena dnayona kika l laqi mntakun kii dheya teru nii teru teru h ah hei qhuni bnegena.
S.PHON: dn ma kika ɾiso teɾu nii ka pnkiŋan teɾu bnegena teɾu bnegena dnajona kika l laqi mntakun kii dħeja teɾu nii teɾu teɾu ħ aħ ħei qħuni bnegena.
S.FORM: dn ma kika riso teru nii ka pnkingan teru bnegena teru bnegena dnayona kika l laqi mntakun kii dheya teru nii teru teru h ah hei qhuni bnegena.
S.PHON: dn ma kika ɾiso teɾu nii ka pnkiŋan teɾu bnegena teɾu bnegena dnajona kika l laqi mntakun kii dħeja teɾu nii teɾu teɾu ħ aħ ħei qħuni bnegena.
S.TRANSL: 那個跌倒的男孩把三個水果給每一個人.
the boy who fell gave the three fruits to each one.

S.FORM: ma wada pnkingan mekan nii mg mekan mekan di.
S.PHON: ma wada pnkiŋan mekan nii mg mekan mekan di.
S.FORM: ma wada pnkingan mekan nii mg mekan mekan di.
S.PHON: ma wada pnkiŋan mekan nii mg mekan mekan di.
S.TRANSL: 每個人都邊走邊吃水果.
each one left eating the fruit.

S.FORM: de deheya teru nii ma moda kika ah gana maanu di kika rudan ga lmamu a hei qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: de deħeja teɾu nii ma moda kika aħ gana maanu di kika ɾudan ga lmamu a ħei qħuni kija.
S.FORM: de deheya teru nii ma moda kika ah gana maanu di kika rudan ga lmamu a hei qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: de deħeja teɾu nii ma moda kika aħ gana maanu di kika ɾudan ga lmamu a ħei qħuni kija.
S.TRANSL: 他們三個來到老人採水果那兒.
the three of them came to the place the old man is picking fruits.

S.FORM: mo knduwa naq moda hii eluna dungun ma.
S.PHON: mo knduwa naq moda ħii eluna duŋun ma.
S.FORM: mo knduwa naq moda hii eluna dungun ma.
S.PHON: mo knduwa naq moda ħii eluna duŋun ma.
S.TRANSL: 他們同樣是經過,
they passes the road as usual.

S.FORM: qmita ka rudan nii mesa.
S.PHON: qmita ka ɾudan nii mesa.
S.FORM: qmita ka rudan nii mesa.
S.PHON: qmita ka ɾudan nii mesa.
S.TRANSL: 這老人看,
the old man sees.

S.FORM: eh hu mhm butu ah wa musa lmamu baro ssoni han wadana geeguyanna laqi nii ciida wa.
S.PHON: eħ ħu mħm butu aħ wa musa lmamu baɾo ssoni ħan wadana geegujanna laqi nii ʦiida wa.
S.FORM: eh hu mhm butu ah wa musa lmamu baro ssoni han wadana geeguyanna laqi nii ciida wa.
S.PHON: eħ ħu mħm butu aħ wa musa lmamu baɾo ssoni ħan wadana geegujanna laqi nii ʦiida wa.
S.TRANSL: 先前小孩偷走的時候,他正好上去採收,
he went up to pick fruits when the child stole the fruit earlier.

S.FORM: ma kika rudan ciida de kika meyah ah tuting dheran ma meyah mita maanu di lnamuna hei qhuni.
S.PHON: ma kika ɾudan ʦiida de kika mejaħ aħ tutiŋ dħeɾan ma mejaħ mita maanu di lnamuna ħei qħuni.
S.FORM: ma kika rudan ciida de kika meyah ah tuting dheran ma meyah mita maanu di lnamuna hei qhuni.
S.PHON: ma kika ɾudan ʦiida de kika mejaħ aħ tutiŋ dħeɾan ma mejaħ mita maanu di lnamuna ħei qħuni.
S.TRANSL: 所以他下來的時候,看他採的水果.
so when he comes down, he sees the fruits he picked.

S.FORM: hi lngelung we malu so hari daha a rawa ah l lnamumu soni malux ka m msngari kingan bale so hari mesa ga.
S.PHON: ħi lŋeluŋ we malu so ħaɾi daħa a ɾawa aħ l lnamumu soni malux ka m msŋaɾi kiŋan bale so ħaɾi mesa ga.
S.FORM: hi lngelung we malu so hari daha a rawa ah l lnamumu soni malux ka m msngari kingan bale so hari mesa ga.
S.PHON: ħi lŋeluŋ we malu so ħaɾi daħa a ɾawa aħ l lnamumu soni malux ka m msŋaɾi kiŋan bale so ħaɾi mesa ga.
S.TRANSL: 「我剛才採了兩籃,為什麼現在只剩下一籃了?」他說.
"I have just picked two baskets of fruits. Why there left only one", he says.

S.FORM: so hari wgag inina kelai lmngelung.
S.PHON: so ħaɾi wgag inina kelai lmŋeluŋ.
S.FORM: so hari wgag inina kelai lmngelung.
S.PHON: so ħaɾi wgag inina kelai lmŋeluŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他好像想不通,
he seems not confused.

S.FORM: oiwa mesa wada inu kingan ka mesa lmngelung peni na.
S.PHON: oiwa mesa wada inu kiŋan ka mesa lmŋeluŋ peni na.
S.FORM: oiwa mesa wada inu kingan ka mesa lmngelung peni na.
S.PHON: oiwa mesa wada inu kiŋan ka mesa lmŋeluŋ peni na.
S.TRANSL: 他在想另一個籃子到哪去了.
he thinks where one basket is gone.

S.FORM: wisu ka deheya teru nii mkkesa moda hii ma mekan mekan hei qhuni kika quwaqna ma kika.
S.PHON: wisu ka deħeja teɾu nii mkkesa moda ħii ma mekan mekan ħei qħuni kika quwaqna ma kika.
S.FORM: wisu ka deheya teru nii mkkesa moda hii ma mekan mekan hei qhuni kika quwaqna ma kika.
S.PHON: wisu ka deħeja teɾu nii mkkesa moda ħii ma mekan mekan ħei qħuni kika quwaqna ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 他們三位走路經過那裡,嘴裏吃著那個樹果,
the three children passed there. They were eating the fruit.

S.FORM: ma lmngelung ah baki nii mesa ye ye we ma mhuwa mesa lmngelung uri inimu kelai.
S.PHON: ma lmŋeluŋ aħ baki nii mesa je je we ma mħuwa mesa lmŋeluŋ uɾi inimu kelai.
S.FORM: ma lmngelung ah baki nii mesa ye ye we ma mhuwa mesa lmngelung uri inimu kelai.
S.PHON: ma lmŋeluŋ aħ baki nii mesa je je we ma mħuwa mesa lmŋeluŋ uɾi inimu kelai.
S.TRANSL: 所以這老人可能想,
so the old man probably thinks,

S.FORM: ma inina kesai yenamu uxe gneeguyan uri ma.
S.PHON: ma inina kesai jenamu uxe gneegujan uɾi ma.
S.FORM: ma inina kesai yenamu uxe gneeguyan uri ma.
S.PHON: ma inina kesai jenamu uxe gneegujan uɾi ma.

TRANSL.notes: 但是他也沒有問說「你們(的水果是不是)偷的?」然後,

S.TRANSL: 但是他也沒有問說「你們 偷的?」然後,
but he did not say 'did you steal?' then,

S.FORM: inina kesai eh inina slingi ka riso nii ma wada naq theyaq ka teru riso nii.
S.PHON: inina kesai eħ inina sliŋi ka ɾiso nii ma wada naq tħejaq ka teɾu ɾiso nii.
S.FORM: inina kesai eh inina slingi ka riso nii ma wada naq theyaq ka teru riso nii.
S.PHON: inina kesai eħ inina sliŋi ka ɾiso nii ma wada naq tħejaq ka teɾu ɾiso nii.
S.TRANSL: 他並沒有質問男孩,然後男孩們就去玩了.
he did not ask to the young men and they went to play.
